meaning: n.[医]疣,[植]瘤,瑕疵,讨厌的人
examples: Robbed of its microbes, the wart gradually vanishes.
A real wart: sorting heterogeneous collections.
But if you are a worry wart then buy only essential service revenue and General Obligation municipal bonds.
And any oil-stoked or worry-wart-induced inflation will be cut off by his toughness.
